playbook.intent: Open product question -> prioritized opportunity tree ready for design/PM to action.
playbook.scope: UX research lead runs a 4-week closed-loop discovery on one product area. Includes scoping + plan sign-off, mixed-methods fieldwork (interviews + survey + contextual inquiry), synthesis with affinity diagramming, and a stakeholder readout that hands a prioritized opportunity tree to design and PM. Done when stakeholders accept the opportunity tree and at least one opportunity is queued in the product backlog.

success-criteria.criterion: Research plan signed off by sponsor before week 2
Mixed-methods fieldwork completed: interviews + survey + at least 1 contextual visit
At least one opportunity queued in the product backlog
Research artifacts filed in the repository

stage.name: Scope + plan
stage.intent: Lock the research question and method mix before recruiting.

tasks.task: Write a 1-page research brief: question, decisions it informs, audience

stage.name: Recruit
stage.intent: The right participants, in time, with consent.

tasks.task: Define screener criteria from audience segments

stage.decision-gate: Advance when target sample is confirmed.

stage.name: Fieldwork
stage.intent: Mixed-methods data collection across the cohort.

tasks.task: Optional: short diary study where behaviour over time matters

outputs.output: Raw artifacts + transcripts in the repo

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when sample is sufficient (saturation on top themes).

stage.name: AI-assisted analysis
stage.intent: Code the qualitative data fast without losing signal.

tasks.task: Run AI transcript analysis for pattern detection
Human-review the AI codes; reject false positives
Cross-reference survey results to confirm patterns

outputs.output: Tagged insight bank with evidence per code

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each insight has >=3 evidence points.

stage.name: Opportunity tree
stage.intent: Convert insights into a structured opportunity tree.

tasks.task: Map insights to outcomes, opportunities, solutions
Rank opportunities by impact + confidence + effort
Define success metrics per top opportunity

stage.decision-gate: Advance after design + PM can articulate the top 3 opportunities.

stage.name: Readout + handoff
stage.intent: Stakeholders accept and use the findings.

tasks.task: Run a 1h readout with sponsor + design + PM
File full report + raw artifacts in the repo
Queue at least one opportunity in the product backlog

stage.decision-gate: Done when sponsor accepts and a backlog entry exists.

extra.value: [Skipping sponsor sign-off -> readout met with 'we already knew that', Over-reliance on AI codes without human review -> false patterns, No opportunity queued in backlog -> research dies on the shelf]
['Could design + PM build from the opportunity tree without re-asking?', 'Is each insight supported by >=3 evidence points?', 'Are artifacts filed so the next researcher can re-use?']

{human: faion get-content user-research-sprint-discovery-to-recommendations-4-weeks --format md, agent: faion get-content user-research-sprint-discovery-to-recommendations-4-weeks --format context, json: faion get-content user-research-sprint-discovery-to-recommendations-4-weeks --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
